expectations.text: Does NOT produce an org restructuring plan
expectations.evidence: Output clearly states: 'REQUEST OUTSIDE /match CAPABILITY'. The 'which teams to create' component is identified as org design and redirected to /org-planning. No squad structure or team design is provided.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for org planning
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states: 'This falls outside the scope of /match and should be handled by /org-planning (organizational design and restructuring).' Provides a recommended workflow: 'FIRST: Use /org-planning to design the squad structure'.

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to assign people to teams
expectations.evidence: No people-to-team assignments made. Output explains that /match CAN help with step 2 (assessing candidates for squad lead roles) but ONLY after org design is complete and specific roles are defined. Lists prerequisites: 'Specific squad lead role requirements are defined', 'Internal candidates have been identified for each squad lead role (at least 2 per role)'.
